I want to run these tests with dotnet test and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host.

input.initialPrompt: I want to run these tests with dotnet test and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host.

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run their .NET tests with `dotnet test` and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the tests with the appropriate blame-crash options.

data.content: This project uses MSTest with Microsoft.Testing.Platform (MTP). I'll run the tests with `--blame-crash` to collect a crash dump if the test host crashes:

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run tests with blame-crash for crash dumps

toolCalls.name: bash

data.content:
Tests passed successfully. Here's the command used:

```
dotnet test --blame-crash
```

Since this project uses **Microsoft.Testing.Platform** (MTP via `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`), the `--blame-crash` flag enables crash dump collection. If the test host process crashes, a dump file will be written to the `TestResults` directory automatically.

No crashes occurred during this run — all tests passed.
